objective: Repair the exact candidate build tool so two no-cache BuildKit builds bind the immutable Git commit epoch and deterministic output mode, then prove the fix physically before restarting candidate recut.
executable_blocker: R08B-R11 exhausted both arm64 BuildKit and clean x86_64 classic-builder approaches; each produced distinct post-base RUN/COPY layers for the same exact subject because the build command binds no reproducible epoch.
read_set: installed Docker Buildx 0.35.0 documentation for deterministic built-in build arguments
acceptance_commands: physical two no-cache linux/amd64 build equality proof
forbidden_scope: runtime source, Containerfile, contracts, dependency lock, provider, policy, model registry, config, migration or CI mutation
weakening no-cache, exact-subject, two-build, inventory, SBOM, secret scan or advisory acceptance
provider call, live/VPS/canonical action, force push or history rewrite
candidate cut or DONE claim in this repair stage
stop_conditions: SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH is not derived from the exact candidate commit
BuildKit deterministic arguments do not make two physical no-cache builds identical
